patient.query: It feels like I’m in this never-ending cycle, you know? Whenever I see someone else succeeding, I just end up feeling like I’m falling short. It’s like I start listing all the things I’m doing wrong and forget about anything I’ve accomplished. It just makes me feel more anxious and isolated, like I’m on the outside looking in.
